rationale: Closest generated candidate to the intended soft storybook encyclopedia direction.
Avoids baked-in tiara, earrings, necklace, or other slot-contaminating accessories.
Short bob hair stays clear of the torso and neckline.
Round neckline leaves room for necklace validation.
Feet are visible enough to test left and right shoe placement.
risks: The watercolor texture may make automatic background removal and later recoloring less crisp than the previous cleaner base.
The inner dress has visible watercolor shading, so top and bottom overlays may need to fully cover the torso and skirt region.
Manual anchors are still estimates and should be adjusted after the first necklace and shoe composites.
